sources.excerpt: ZHANGXiyuan2004/VibeLaTeX/PRD.md GitHub code result: ZHANGXiyuan2004/VibeLaTeX/PRD.md # PRD：VibeLaTeX（Vibe Latex 公式工作台） ## 1. 背景与问题 在写论文、讲义、技术文档时，LaTeX 公式常见痛点： * 写得快但排版差：可读性、对齐、空格、环境选择不统一 * 渲染报错难定位：括号/环境/宏问题排查耗时 * 需要导出透明背景公式图（PPT/Keynote/Figma/网页）但工具繁琐 * 希望用 AI 自动“格式化、修复、重构、生成、解释”公式，减少重复劳动 * 期望界面简洁美观，所见即所得 ## 2. 产品定位 **VibeLaTeX** 是一个面向公式创作的轻量工作台： **实时渲染 ...

sources.excerpt: fix(moa): preserve slot credentials for custom_provider references ## What does this PR do? When a MoA preset references a `custom_provider` as a reference model (or aggregator), credentials configured in the slot (`api_key`, `base_url`, `api_mode`) were not being passed to `resolve_runtime_provider`. The slot only forwarded `provider` and `model`, leavin...

sources.excerpt: reporting-release-summary: use z.ai (GLM) instead of Anthropic ## Problem The **Get PR's** job (`reporting-release-summary.yml`) failed at the *Write a short journalistic intro with AI* step: ``` anthropic.BadRequestError: Error code: 400 - Your credit balance is too low to access the Anthropic API. ``` ## Fix Point the AI step at **z.ai's Anthropic-compa...
sources.title: reporting-release-summary: use z.ai (GLM) instead of Anthropic

sources.excerpt: feat(gateway): support DeepSeek Anthropic-compatible route for Claude Code-style agents Parent: #3006 Why: DeepSeek officially documents an Anthropic-compatible API at `https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic` and gives Claude Code environment examples. fak can use that to front Claude Code-style agents through the same adjudication gateway, but the compatibil...
sources.title: feat(gateway): support DeepSeek Anthropic-compatible route for Claude Code-style agents

sources.excerpt: docs(deepseek): publish V4 Pro runbook, route examples, and alias migration warning Parent: #3006 Why: Once the support spine exists, users need exact commands and honest limitations. The docs must not imply old aliases are stable, and must distinguish hosted DeepSeek, Anthropic-compatible Claude Code use, and self-hosted vLLM/SGLang routes. Source facts:...
